name: Trends Aggregator API
description: Trending topics from Google Trends, Hacker News, Reddit, GitHub, and Product Hunt. All in one API with built-in caching.
long_description: A multi-platform Trends Aggregator API built on Cloudflare Workers. Get trending topics from five major platforms: Google Trends daily search trends (with geo filtering), Hacker News top stories, Reddit popular posts, GitHub trending repositories (past week), and Product Hunt today's top products. Each source includes rich metadata like traffic volume, scores, comments, stars, and related articles. Built-in caching for fast responses. Perfect for dashboards, content discovery, and trend monitoring.

endpoints.name: Google Trends Daily
endpoints.description: Get daily trending search topics from Google Trends

parameters.name: geo
parameters.description: Country code for geo-filtered trends (e.g., US, JP, GB)

endpoints.name: Hacker News Trending
endpoints.description: Get top 25 trending Hacker News stories

endpoints.name: GitHub Trending
endpoints.description: Get top 25 trending GitHub repositories from the past week

endpoints.name: Product Hunt Today
endpoints.description: Get today's top Product Hunt products

endpoints.name: API Info
endpoints.description: Get API information and available endpoints
